title: Products
intro: Define your regular parts, labour and service bundles once — code, cost, price and VAT. Typing the code on a job-card line pre-fills it (editable). Standardises the grain across mechanics; banks the margin at entry.
empty: No products yet. Add your first to speed up job-card entry.
name: Description
confirmDelete: Delete this product permanently? Historic job-card lines keep their values; only the link is cleared.
codeInUse: That code is already in use.
